extraction_metadata.agent: PRN NS 2026 Entity Extraction Agent (scheduled cron)
extraction_metadata.pir06_threshold_status: NOT CROSSED — no formal PN-MT removal notice detected across 3,489 titles scanned (3 cycles). Bersatu operational split confirmed (24 own-logo seats). 3 CRITICAL precursor signals: Kiandee removal call, Ridzuan quits Bersatu, 'toxic PN' claim-counterclaim.
collection_limitations_honest: Malaysiakini paywall: 6 high-value mkini articles captured as title+pubdate+preview (~180-513 chars) only; full body paywalled
The Star + Malay Mail search/listing JS-rendered; 2 Melaka DAP + 1 Fahmi article captured as headline intelligence only (full-text URL unrecoverable via curl)
The Malaysian Insight: homepage returned 0 articles — no coverage this cycle

Albert 'barking dogs' article (mkini /news/780042) full body NOT fetched this cycle — entity derived from headline+description on mkini homepage scrape; full name 'Albert Tei' per director PIR-16 list

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Hadi dismisses Muhyiddin's 'toxic PN' claim, points finger at Bersatu)
entities.context: Bersatu president; PN chairman. Subject of 'toxic PN' claim attributed to him, dismissed by Hadi Awang who points finger back at Bersatu. CRITICAL — 'toxic PN' is a director-flagged PIR-06 termination-adjacent narrative. Also: 'Muhyiddin: Bersatu to use own logo for NS polls' confirms operational split from PN state consensus.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Hadi dismisses Muhyiddin's 'toxic PN' claim)
entities.context: PAS president. Dismissed Muhyiddin's 'toxic PN' claim and pointed finger at Bersatu — CRITICAL counter-signal in PN internal rupture. Also carrier of 'BN-PN ties based on friendship, brotherhood' framing (mkini SNAPSHOT 18 Jul 14:06 MYT) and 'PN to assist BN during NS polls campaign' (NST).

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: PN has grounds to remove Bersatu, says Kiandee)
entities.context: Bersatu VP. CRITICAL PIR-06 precursor: 'PN has grounds (asas kukuh) to remove Bersatu' — a CALL for removal, not a formal notice, but director-flagged 'pecat'-type signal. Stable carryover 18 Jul.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Former Gemas assemblyman Ridzuan Ahmad quits Bersatu [WATCH])
entities.context: CRITICAL PIR-06 'keluar' signal confirmed: former Gemas incumbent, resigned as Bersatu division chief and QUIT Bersatu ahead of NS polls; now contesting Gemas seat under Parti Wawasan Negara. Confirmed via Malay Mail lineup + The Edge headline + NST headline. Director-flagged 'keluar' entity.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Hadi dismisses Muhyiddin's 'toxic PN' claim, points finger at Bersatu)
entities.context: CRITICAL director-flagged 'toxic PN' entity. Attributed to Muhyiddin, dismissed by Hadi who counter-accuses Bersatu. PIR-06 termination-adjacent narrative active in PN internal discourse.

entities.entity: PN has grounds to remove Bersatu
entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: PN has grounds to remove Bersatu, says Kiandee)
entities.context: CRITICAL director-flagged 'pecat'-type signal. Kiandee's call (asas kukuh) — precursor to formal PN-MT removal notice, threshold NOT yet crossed. Active since 18 Jul.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Former Gemas assemblyman Ridzuan Ahmad quits Bersatu)
entities.context: CRITICAL director-flagged 'keluar' signal confirmed. Bersatu-quit figure now running under Wawasan in Gemas. Corroborated by The Edge + Malay Mail lineup + NST headline.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Aminuddin denies fleeing Sikamat, says move to Linggi a strategic choice)
entities.context: PRIORITY director-flagged 'fleeing Sikamat' defector-framing entity. Outgoing MB moved from Sikamat (long-held) to Linggi (BN stronghold). Denies fleeing — frames as strategic choice. Also PIR-16 'MB after PRN' figure: criticised for adat-crisis handling; seat-move linked to adat/royal dispute (Utusan rencana).
PRIORITY director-flagged defector-framing narrative. Aminuddin's Sikamat→Linggi move framed by critics as 'fleeing'; Aminuddin denies, calls it strategic. Active PIR-07 battleground messaging.

entities.entity: Linggi stronghold cannot be taken for granted
entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: BN candidate says Linggi stronghold cannot be taken for granted)
entities.context: PRIORITY director-flagged 'not taking for granted' entity. BN's Faizal Ramli camp messaging on Linggi (N.32) — refuses complacency framing vs MB Aminuddin.

PIR-06 Tier-4 seat AND PIR-07 highest-priority battleground. 3-cornered: Nor Azman Mohamad (PH, Aminuddin's pol-sec) vs Tun Faisal Ismail Aziz (Bersatu info chief) vs Razali Abu Samah (Wawasan). Tests PH without MB on ballot. 'Fleeing Sikamat' narrative carrier.

PIR-06 Tier-4 seat AND PIR-07 highest-priority battleground. Director-flagged candidates: Nazri Kassim (PH) vs Rafie (Datuk Dr Mohamad Rafie Ab Malek, PN 'experienced rep'). Day-1 messaging war: PH 'defector' vs PN 'experienced rep' (carryover).
Director-flagged N.14 Ampangan candidate (per PIR-07 list). PH side of Ampangan messaging war vs PN's Rafie.

entities.entity: Datuk Dr Mohamad Rafie Ab Malek
entities.context: Director-flagged N.14 Ampangan candidate 'Rafie' (per PIR-07 list). PN 'experienced rep' framing vs PH's Nazri Kassim. Active Day-1 messaging war.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: BN unfazed by three-cornered fight in Juasseh)
entities.context: PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list). Three-cornered fight; BN reports 'unfazed'. Full candidate roster not recovered from full text this cycle.
PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list). Candidate detail not recovered from full text this cycle.

PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list). 3-cornered MB battle: Aminuddin Harun (PH, moved from Sikamat) vs Datuk Mohd Faizal Ramli (BN, strong opponent) vs Datuk Zamri Md Said (Bersatu). 'Not taking for granted' + 'fleeing Sikamat' narratives both anchored here.
Director-flagged PIR-07 Faizal Ramli entity. BN's strong opponent to MB Aminuddin in Linggi (N.32). Carrier of 'Linggi stronghold cannot be taken for granted' framing.
PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list). Candidate detail not recovered from full text this cycle.

PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list, named 'Bembang'). NOTE: lineup full-text recovered 'Bahau' seat (DAP Teo Kok Seong vs MCA Chong Fui Ming); whether 'N.20 Bembang' maps to 'Bahau' is unconfirmed from this cycle's full text — kept per director list verbatim.
PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list). Candidate detail not recovered from full text this cycle.

PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list) + 5-cornered vote-split test. DAP J. Arul Kumar (incumbent) vs BN Lai Chien Kong vs Bersatu V. Saravan Kumar vs Berjasa Zamani Ibrahim vs Indep Omar Isa.

PIR-07 highest-priority battleground (director list) + 5-cornered vote-split test. PH Dr G. Rajasekaran vs BN A. Achutan vs Bersatu M. Leevineshwaraan Murugan vs Indep Datuk A. Saravanan vs Indep Islah Wahyudi Sainudin.
PIR-06 Tier-4 seat (director list). Bersatu-vs-PN clash seat under watch for candidate withdrawals / vote-split damage. No Bersatu withdrawals reported this cycle.
PIR-06 Tier-4 seat (director list). Bersatu-vs-PN clash seat under watch. No withdrawals reported.
PIR-06 Tier-4 seat (director list). Bersatu-vs-PN clash seat under watch. No withdrawals reported.
PIR-06 Tier-4 seat (director list). Bersatu-vs-PN clash seat under watch. No withdrawals reported.
PIR-06 Tier-4 seat (director list). Bersatu-vs-PN clash seat under watch. No withdrawals reported.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 viral-content amplifier. Businessperson in PN camp who called Harapan supporters 'barking dogs'; says he referred to those who provoked and insulted him. Article /news/780042 (mkini) — full body NOT fetched this cycle; entity derived from mkini homepage headline+description. Full name 'Albert Tei' per director PIR-16 list.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 viral-content amplifier narrative. PN-camp businessperson Albert Tei labelled Harapan supporters 'barking dogs'. High viral-potential insult narrative entering Day-1 campaign.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 narrative. 'Company gave Bersatu RM1m for unknown reasons, witness tells court in Muhyiddin's graft trial' — Nepturis managing director testified payment made on instruction of company owner. Active trial narrative framing Bersatu/Muhyiddin credibility.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 narrative. DAP QUIT Melaka state govt over bill allowing appointed/nominated assemblymen; 4 DAP reps + 1 Amanah (Adly) moved to opposition bloc. DOMINANT narrative directly framing DAP acceptance in NS PRN Malay seats. Anwar urged postpone; Melaka CM said 'abrupt exit shuts door on negotiations'; Perak unity ties unaffected.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 'Loke (DAP)' key figure. DAP sec-gen / Transport Minister / Seremban MP. Defends Chennah (PH). Day-1: urged traffic-rule compliance (helmet use, no standing on 4x4s) after PH candidates met visitors at Pasar Besar Seremban. PIR-16 narratives attached: leadership-referendum framing, 'penyaluran dana' adat controversy, DAP-not-quitting-Harapan, 'campaign of hope'.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 narrative. NS adat/istana (royal) crisis surfaced as PRN campaign issue. Tok Mat: 'keep adat out of polls campaign' (mkini SNAPSHOT 18 Jul 14:06). Aminuddin criticised for failing to handle adat crisis; seat-move linked to adat dispute (Utusan rencana). Loke 'penyaluran dana' controversy with Balai Undang Luak Sungai Ujong. Anwar: 'Don't campaign on NS ruler crisis'. Rembau chieftain sacked 3 nobles; court injunction.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 narrative. 'Maximise Malay vote' framing behind BN-PN electoral understanding (BN25+PN11) to avoid friendly fights. Kosmo full text: 'mengelakkan pertembungan sesama sendiri dan memaksimumkan pengundian Melayu'. Active dominant narrative.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 narrative. 'MB after PRN' question active: Aminuddin (outgoing MB) moved to Linggi; if PH loses, MB question opens. Utusan rencana frames Aminuddin seat-move + adat-crisis failure as MB-credibility referendum.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 narrative. 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' (mkini SNAPSHOT 18 Jul 18:00) + Bersatu going solo — raises question of who constitutes 'sole opposition' after PRN. PN/Bersatu split reframes opposition bloc identity.

PRIORITY director-flagged PIR-16 narrative (per list). 'Easy majority' framing — watch for emergence in campaign coverage; not yet directly quoted in this cycle's recovered text but listed as PIR-16 narrative to monitor.

entities.entity: Harapan Youth demands BN ministers quit
entities.context: PRIORITY viral-content amplifier. AMH (Angkatan Muda Harapan) demands BN ministers/deputy ministers quit Cabinet over PN alliance — 'BN is ungrateful despite trust and positions given by PM.' mkini top story + Astro Awani. Day-1 amplification of BN-PN cooperation backlash.

PRIORITY viral-content amplifier. mkini (Zarrah Morden): 'DAP revives anti-BN campaign ahead of NS polls — leaders bring up 1MDB scandal, ruler crisis, and political manoeuvres.' Direct PIR-16 narrative activation tying NS campaign to national anti-BN themes.

Perikatan Nasional. In NS: PN = PAS+Gerakan+Wawasan+MIPP (11 candidates) under BN-PN understanding. Bersatu broke consensus by going solo (24 own-logo seats). PN-MT (Majlis Tertinggi) has NOT issued formal removal notice for Bersatu.

Parti Pribumi Bersatu Malaysia. Operational split confirmed: 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri', 24 own-logo seats, 'memecah undi di kawasan-kawasan kritikal' (Kosmo full text). Subject of Kiandee's removal call + 'toxic PN' claim-counterclaim. Ridzuan Ahmad quit.
PN Supreme Council — director PIR-06 watch entity. Has NOT convened/issued formal removal notice for Bersatu. Threshold for formal removal NOT crossed across 3,489 titles scanned.
Director PIR-06 watch entity (coalition operational arrangement). PAS president Hadi Awang is the active carrier of 'brotherhood/friendship' + 'toxic PN' counter-claim framing.
Director PIR-06 watch entity. Muhyiddin-led. Decision to go solo under own logo in NS (24 seats) breaks PN state consensus — operational split decision-maker.
Director PIR-06 watch entity. Bersatu sec-gen / PN sec-gen. Not directly quoted in this cycle's recovered full text; carried as watch figure per director list.
Tan Sri Annuar Musa — director PIR-06 watch entity. Not directly quoted in this cycle's recovered full text; carried as watch figure per director list.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: PN may continue BN cooperation if Negri Sembilan results prove positive, says Samsuri)
entities.context: Director PIR-06 'Samsuri' entity (Datuk Seri Dr Ahmad Samsuri Mokhtar, PAS VP / Terengganu MB). States PN may continue BN cooperation beyond NS if results prove positive — forward-looking coalition arrangement signal.

entities.entity: Bersatu goes solo under own logo
entities.source_url: https://www.malaysiakini.com/news/779996 + https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Bersatu goes solo in Negri Sembilan polls, PN says move expected)
entities.context: PIR-06 dominant operational-split narrative. Muhyiddin: Bersatu to use own logo for NS polls. PN says move 'expected'. 24 own-logo seats. Breaks PN state consensus — strongest operational-split confirmation to date, but NOT a formal expulsion.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Negri Sembilan polls: Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation [WATCH])
entities.context: PIR-06 narrative. NST frames Bersatu as 'at a crossroads' amid BN-PN cooperation — disarray/strategic-choice framing.
PIR-06+PIR-16 narrative. mkini SNAPSHOT (18 Jul 18:00 MYT) amplifies 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' as live rhetorical question. Headline itself is the signal (body paywalled).

PIR-16 DOMINANT official-framing narrative. Wee Ka Siong (MCA president): 'BN-PN pact in NS not a merger, MCA principles intact; each party retains ideology/stance; pact for strong stable state govt' (18 Jul 14:47 MYT). Zahid: 'merely an understanding, no agreements' (carryover).

PIR-16 narrative. MCA Youth sec-gen Saw Yee Fung told to 'stay out of NS polls' over PN-ally disagreement; MCA sec-gen Chong Sin Woon WhatsApp: 'you don't have to come.' Shows BN-PN cooperation causing internal MCA friction.

MCA Youth sec-gen. Criticised BN's decision to cooperate with PN; instructed to skip NS campaign. Facebook post with screenshot of WhatsApp from Chong Sin Woon: 'you don't have to come.' Questions if party no longer tolerates dissenting views.
MCA secretary-general. Sent WhatsApp message 'you don't have to come' to Saw Yee Fung re NS campaign — carrier of MCA internal dissent narrative.
Datuk Dr Wee Ka Siong, MCA president. Carrier of 'BN-PN pact NOT a merger, MCA principles intact' dominant PIR-16 official framing (18 Jul 14:47 MYT).
PIR-07+16 narrative. NS Police: 1 election-offense report (verbal dispute) from nomination day; no investigation paper; 19 ceramah permits ALL APPROVED. Loke campaign Day-1 at Pasar Besar Seremban.

PIR-09+16 narrative. Tamim Dahri Abd Razak (self-proclaimed land activist) surrendered at Port Dickson police HQ 12:45pm; on the run from court charges linked to religious provocation; hopes to campaign for NS independent candidate. Red notice applied for (Anwar statement).

entities.source_url: https://www.utusan.com.my/nasional/2026/07/felda-mesti-terus-angkat-martabat-peneroka-anwar/ + https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Anwar: Give PH a stronger mandate to ensure continuity)
entities.context: PM. 'Give PH a stronger mandate to ensure continuity' (NST). Urged Melaka DAP to postpone quit-state-govt decision; says 'not briefed' on DAP reps quitting. 'Don't campaign on NS ruler crisis; red notice applied for Tamim' (mkini). Felda statement (Utusan). Zahid to meet Anwar on NS govt administration issue.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Zahid: BN enters Negri Sembilan polls eyeing stable government) + https://www.malaysiakini.com (Zahid: BN won't interfere in NS royal matters)
entities.context: BN chairman / Umno president. 'BN enters NS polls eyeing stable government'; 'BN won't interfere in NS royal matters, priority is unity'; 'BN collaboration with PN merely an understanding, no agreements' (carryover). PAS hits back at 'shifting goalposts' jab.

entities.source_url: https://www.malaymail.com/news/malaysia/2026/07/18/fractured-alliances-multi-cornered-fights-shape-negeri-sembilan-state-election-after-nominations-close/228136 + https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: Negri Sembilan polls: Lion dance kicks off Tok Mat's bid to retain Rantau)
entities.context: Umno deputy president / BN deputy chairman. Defends Rantau (straight fight vs PKR's Dr Azizul Hakim Mahdi). Day-1: lion dance kicks off bid to retain Rantau. Carrier of PIR-16 'keep adat out of polls campaign' (mkini SNAPSHOT 18 Jul 14:06).
BN bigwig retaining Pertang seat (Kosmo). Among 'tokoh besar kem' keeping position in nomination lineup.

entities.source_url: https://www.nstcommy_20260719_034922.md (gnews: Johari urges BN machinery to run healthy Negri Sembilan polls campaign)
entities.context: Datuk Seri Johari Abdul Ghani (Umno). Urges BN machinery to run 'healthy' NS polls campaign.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: BN-PN understanding aimed at ensuring Negri Sembilan political stability, says Asyraf Wajdi)
entities.context: Carrier of 'BN-PN understanding aimed at ensuring NS political stability' framing.

entities.source_url: https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: PKR, PH respect parties' right to set own strategy for N9 polls - Fuziah)
entities.context: PKR/PH spokesperson. 'PKR, PH respect parties' right to set own strategy for N9 polls' — frames Bersatu going solo as respected party-strategy decision.

entities.source_url: https://www.malaymail.com (gnews: Fahmi says Pakatan will let Tok Min's track record do the talking as race to keep Negeri Sembilan begins) + priority_pir-07_malaymail-fahmi-tokmin-track-record_20260719_034922.md
entities.context: Fahmi (Pakatan). 'Will let Tok Min's track record do the talking' — anchor for Aminuddin (Tok Min = Aminuddin Harun) re-election messaging. Article full-text NOT recovered (Malay Mail homepage extraction failed).
NS Police Chief. Confirmed 1 election-offense report (verbal dispute, no investigation paper) + 19 ceramah permits ALL APPROVED. Cited re Tamim surrender (PD police HQ 12:45pm).

Self-proclaimed land activist. Surrendered at PD police HQ 12:45pm (18 Jul); on the run from court charges linked to religious provocation; hopes to campaign for NS independent candidate. Red notice applied for (Anwar statement, mkini gnews). PIR-09+16 independent-credibility narrative carrier.

Election Commission (SPR) chairman. Confirmed 103 candidates / 36 seats; 11 straight, 21 three-cornered, 2 four-cornered, 2 five-cornered; 94 men / 9 women; oldest Abd Latif A Tambi (70, Gemencheh), youngest Leevineshwaraan Murugan (23, Sri Tanjung).
NS adat institution. Disputed a 'penyaluran dana' entity that Loke/DAP were alleged to have funded; Loke denies DAP interfering in adat/royal institution. PIR-16 adat-dispute narrative carrier.
NS royal figure (adat/royal crisis). Referenced in prior-cycle entity build; adat-dispute narrative peripheral figure.

entities.source_url: https://www.malaysiakini.com (gnews: Negeri Sembilan GTA proposes ex-IGP Hamid to face Tok Mat in Rembau)
entities.context: Ex-IGP proposed by GTA to face Tok Mat in Rembau (pre-nomination speculation; not in final NS lineup). Peripheral watch figure.

entities.source_url: https://www.nstcommy_20260719_034922.md (gnews: Bersama a 'spoiler' that cost PH seats in Johor, claims Tony Pua)
entities.context: Claims Bersama was a 'spoiler' that cost PH seats in Johor. PIR-16 spoiler/vote-split narrative carrier (relevant to NS multi-cornered dynamics).

mkini COMMENT 'Oh, so the state elections are an indicator?' (19 Jul 09:49 MYT). Argues state elections as national-indicator framing; 'we will probably see another hung parliament after next GE.' PIR-16 indicator narrative carrier.
mkini KINIGUIDE author: 'Shifting alliances as battle royale for Negeri Sembilan begins' — primer on NS alliance landscape. Also authored 'From PN camp, Albert calls Harapan supporters barking dogs'.
mkini COMMENT 'Can the derhaka card defeat BN?' — PIR-16 derhaka/adat narrative carrier; argues 'obvious who defied the state monarch' in NS.
mkini COMMENT 'Malaysia's culture of khianat and the ballot box' — PIR-16 betrayal/loyalty narrative carrier.
mkini author: 'DAP revives anti-BN campaign ahead of NS polls' (1MDB, ruler crisis, political manoeuvres).
mkini author: 'N Sembilan polls: Bersatu to contest under own flag, avoids BN, Harapan strongholds' — PIR-06 operational-split narrative.
mkini co-author (with Hariz Mohd) of 'Albert calls Harapan supporters barking dogs' article.
mkini author: 'Company gave Bersatu RM1m for unknown reasons, witness tells court in Muhyiddin's graft trial' — PIR-16 Muhyiddin graft trial narrative.
mkini author: PSM 'sosah' charm-offensive / dialect-hurdle story — PIR-16 minor-party narrative carrier.
mkini author: 'Tackling the iceberg' (top story).
Incumbent state govt. 36 candidates in NS. Defending 20 seats (incl. all 11 DAP seats). Aminuddin as 'poster boy' MB candidate.
BN: 25 candidates in NS under BN-PN understanding (PAS/Gerakan/Wawasan/MIPP fill remaining 11). 'Tok mat' Rantau, Jalaluddin Pertang retained.
BN component. Wee Ka Siong 'not a merger' + MCA Youth sec-gen Saw Yee Fung told to stay out of NS. Internal dissent over PN cooperation. Chennah: Siow Kong Choon vs Anthony Loke.
BN lead component. Tok Mat (Rantau), Jalaluddin (Pertang), Johari, Zahid as national figures. Zool Amali Hussein = former Seremban Umno Youth chief (defector to Bersatu).

PH component. Defending all 11 NS seats (won PRU-14 2018 + PRN 2023). Under pressure post-Sabah/Johor defeats. Quit Melaka state govt. Loke as sec-gen faces leadership referendum. UEC + 41 kampung baru Cina issues.
PH component. Aminuddin (Linggi), Dr Azizul Hakim Mahdi (Rantau vs Tok Mat), Siti Aishah Seman (Gemas).
PH component. Zarinna Abu Zarin (Lenggeng), Ahmad Shahir Mohd Shah (Paroi), Nasir Rahman (Bagan Pinang). In Melaka: Adly still seated with govt while 4 DAP reps moved to opposition.

entities.source_url: https://www.kosmo.com.my/2026/07/19/percaturan-bn-ph-bersatu/ + https://www.nst.com.my (gnews: PN-BN understanding boosts Pas hopes in Negri Sembilan polls)
entities.context: PN component (within BN-PN understanding). 'PN-BN understanding boosts PAS hopes in NS polls' (NST). Hadi: 'PN to assist BN during NS polls campaign'. PAS candidates: Dr P. Kumar (Lobak), Kamarol Ridzuan Mohd Zain (Paroi), Abdul Fatah Zakaria (Bagan Pinang).
PN component. Lee Boon Shian (Bukit Kepayang vs DAP Nicole Tan).
PN component. Ridzuan Ahmad (Gemas — Bersatu-quit figure), Razali Abu Samah (Sikamat). PIR-06 defector-destination party.
PN component (Malaysian Indian People's Party). Sathes Kumar Nilameham (Lukut vs DAP Choo Ken Hwa).
Zamani Ibrahim (Nilai N.10, 5-cornered).
Dayana Dal (Jeram Padang, 4-cornered).
T. Tharmaseelan (Rahang, 4-cornered). 'Sosah' charm-offensive dialect narrative (mkini).

entities.source_url: https://www.nstcommy_20260719_034922.md (gnews: Bersama a 'spoiler' that cost PH seats in Johor, claims Tony Pua)
entities.context: Sat out NS. Tony Pua claims Bersama was 'spoiler' that cost PH seats in Johor. PIR-16 spoiler/vote-split narrative reference.
Harapan Youth wing. Demands BN ministers/deputy ministers quit Cabinet over PN alliance — 'BN is ungrateful despite trust and positions given by PM.' Day-1 PIR-16 amplification of BN-PN backlash.

entities.context: Proposed ex-IGP Hamid to face Tok Mat in Rembau (pre-nomination; not in final lineup).
Marquee straight fight: Anthony Loke (PH-DAP sec-gen/Transport Minister) vs Siow Kong Choon (BN-MCA). DAP sec-gen defends. PIR-07 marquee + PIR-16 Loke leadership-referendum seat.
Defends Chennah. Marquee PIR-07 candidate. (See PIR-16 entry for full narrative context.)
MCA candidate vs Anthony Loke in Chennah straight fight.

entities.context: Marquee straight fight: Tok Mat (BN-Umno dep president) vs Dr Azizul Hakim Mahdi (PH-PKR). Tok Mat defends. Day-1: lion dance launch.
PKR candidate vs Tok Mat in Rantau straight fight.
Bersatu candidate in Linggi (N.32) 3-cornered vs Aminuddin (PH) + Faizal Ramli (BN).
PH candidate in Sikamat (N.13); Aminuddin's political secretary. Tests PH without MB on ballot.
Bersatu information chief; candidate in Sikamat (N.13) 3-cornered. PIR-06 Tier-4 seat candidate.
Wawasan candidate in Sikamat (N.13) 3-cornered.
3-cornered: BN Datuk Mohd Asna Amin vs Amanah Zarinna Abu Zarin vs Bersatu Zool Amali Hussein (former Seremban Umno Youth chief — defector). Shifting alliances.
BN candidate in Lenggeng 3-cornered.
Amanah candidate in Lenggeng 3-cornered.
Bersatu candidate in Lenggeng; former Seremban Umno Youth chief — defector. PIR-16 shifting-alliances carrier.
